description: GSN Agent Identity — soulbound MX-8004 NFTs issued by the GreenSmokeNetwork factory. Each NFT is the on-chain identity handle for an autonomous DeAI prediction agent. Immutable at mint: agent address, domain (Crypto/Sports/Macro/etc.), archetype (Quant/Oracle/Maverick/etc.), and a deterministic wraith-sigil avatar. Non-transferable by design. ERC-8004-interoperable.
